name: Spammies
subtitle: Family-run café in Morley, Leeds. Proper food, all day.

address.full: Spammies, 135 Wide Lane, Morley, Leeds LS27 8DF

hero.title: Proper sandwiches. Proper breakfasts.
hero.text: We're a family-owned sandwich shop on Wide Lane. Hot and cold sarnies, toasties, jackets, salads and a cuppa. Eat in or takeaway.
hero.imageNote: Hero background sandwich close-up; sign inlet uses public/images/brand/sign-hero.jpg

about.heading: Your local sandwich shop
about.text: Spammies is a small, family-run sandwich shop in Morley. We keep it simple: fresh fillings, generous portions and a friendly welcome. Come in for an all-day breakfast, a BEST butty, or a quick tea on the way to work.

seo.title: Spammies Sandwich Shop | Morley, Leeds
seo.description: Family-owned sandwich shop in Morley, Leeds. Hot and cold sandwiches, breakfasts, toasties, jackets, salads and drinks. 135 Wide Lane, LS27 8DF. Tel 07902 771 542.

footer.note: Eat in or takeaway. Cash and card. Also on Just Eat.
